summary: Iteration 102 - Claret AI Reminder System & Competitor Intelligence Enhancement Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Competitor Intelligence Hub with 6 real competitor URLs, CS Student Modal with tabbed interface (Info/Transactions/Calls/Update), Sales CRM color-coding for closed leads, Executive Dashboard with Team Mood section, Claret widget visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 102 verified all new features: 1) Claret Reminder System: POST /api/claret/chat with 'remind me at X' creates reminder, GET /api/claret/schedule returns today's schedule with reminders and work_notes, GET /api/claret/reminders returns {reminders: [...]} list, DELETE /api/claret/reminders/{id} deletes reminder. 2) Claret Enhanced Features: Target calculation works (e.g., 'I need 100K in 5 days'), web_context parameter accepted in chat. 3) Competitor Intelligence: 6 competitors with REAL URLs (deltainstitutions.com, fundfloat.ae, mithunsmoneymarket.com, stellarfxacademy.com, jeafx.com, moneytize.ae), scrape endpoint works, battle card generation works. 4) Daily Briefing: GET /api/intelligence/daily-briefing returns personalized sections. 5) Team Mood: GET /api/executive/team-mood returns team mood data. 6) CS Student Modal: Tabbed interface with Info/Transactions/Calls/Update tabs working at /cs. 7) Sales CRM: Color-coding implemented for enrolled (emerald) and rejected (rose) leads. 8) Claret widget visible in bottom-left corner (purple button).

claret_reminder_create.details: POST /api/claret/chat with 'remind me at 5pm to call the new lead' creates reminder successfully

claret_reminders_list.details: GET /api/claret/reminders returns {reminders: [...]} with id, content, reminder_time, status

claret_target_calculation.details: POST /api/claret/chat with target calculation query returns math + advice

competitor_list_real_urls.details: GET /api/intelligence/competitors returns 6 competitors with real URLs: deltainstitutions.com, fundfloat.ae, mithunsmoneymarket.com, stellarfxacademy.com, jeafx.com, moneytize.ae

battle_card_generation.details: POST /api/intelligence/competitors/{id}/battle-card generates AI battle card with overview, strengths, weaknesses, our_advantages

cs_student_modal_tabs.details: CS Kanban at /cs shows student modal with 4 tabs: Info, Transactions, Calls, Update. All tabs have data-testid attributes.

sales_crm_color_coding.details: Sales CRM Kanban has Enrolled (emerald-500) and Rejected (rose-500) columns. Table rows have corresponding color styling.

competitor_intelligence_page.details: Competitor Intelligence Hub at /competitor-intelligence shows 6 competitors with real URLs, Scrape All button, Add Competitor button

executive_dashboard_team_mood.details: Executive Dashboard at /executive shows Team Mood section in page content

claret_widget.details: Purple Claret widget button visible in bottom-left corner of all pages

access_control.details: All endpoints correctly deny unauthenticated access (401/403)

notes.puter_js_web_search: Puter.js web search loaded from CDN - may not work in headless testing. Backend web_context parameter tested instead.
notes.reminder_firing: Reminder firing mechanism runs every 30 seconds - not tested in real-time but CRUD operations verified.
